response: Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily and three times as many as Sophia. They used their blueberries to make muffins. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries and they sold each batch for $5. They made 24 blueberries from Emily, 15 more from David, and three times as many from Sophia. The total blueberries collected were 24 + 39 + 81 = 144. They made 144 divided by 9 equals 16 batches. Each batch sold for $5, so 16 times $5 equals $80. They made $80 from the blueberries they collected. *** The total amount of money they made from the blueberries they collected is $80. Youth
